_format.description: Standard format for n8n workflow payload schemas stored in n8n_workflows.payload_schema

fields.name: field_name
fields.description: human-readable description of what this field is
fields.default: optional — only present when required is false

fields.name: title
fields.description: event title shown in Google Calendar

fields.name: dateTime
fields.description: absolute ISO 8601 start time in WIB (UTC+7) e.g. 2026-04-14T10:00:00+07:00 — never pass relative strings like 'tomorrow'

fields.name: location
fields.description: location of the event e.g. a place name or address

fields.name: days
fields.description: how many days ahead to look (default 7)

fields.name: title
fields.description: title or partial title of the event to update (case-insensitive match)

fields.name: status
fields.description: what to mark the event as: 'cancel' adds [CANCELED] prefix, 'done' adds [DONE] prefix

fields.name: date
fields.description: ISO 8601 date to narrow the match if multiple events share the same title e.g. 2026-04-15
